reasons: Kaja can suppress Lylia before she freely uses Black Shoes.
Lylia is hardest to kill when she chooses the timing of her reset, so forced pickoff windows are valuable.

proof.summary: Lylia wants to survive burst with Black Shoes, while Kaja's targeted suppression can create a forced punish window before she resets.
worksBestWhen: Kaja hides until Lylia steps forward to poke.
The team bursts immediately during Divine Judgment.
failureCases: Lylia keeps distance and pokes outside Kaja's reach.
Kaja engages after Lylia has already reset with Black Shoes.

reasons: Franco can punish Lylia if she steps too far forward to set up Gloom damage.
Suppression is valuable because Lylia's normal escape pattern depends on timing and availability.

proof.summary: Lylia wants to bait enemies into her zone and reset with Black Shoes, while Franco can suppress her and force a burst window before she escapes.
worksBestWhen: Franco waits for Lylia to use movement or overstep.
failureCases: Franco misses hook or uses ultimate after Black Shoes.
Lylia keeps enough distance and forces Franco to reveal first.

reasons: Saber can punish Lylia before she uses Black Shoes by forcing a fast airborne burst window.
The counter is strongest after Black Shoes is down or when Lylia has no defensive spell or item timing available.

proof.summary: Lylia wants to survive burst with Black Shoes, while Saber can knock her airborne and compress the kill window before she can reset.
worksBestWhen: Saber engages from fog or after Lylia has used Black Shoes.
Saber has enough burst damage to finish during the airborne combo.
Lylia does not have Purify, Winter Crown, or prepared defensive timing.
failureCases: Lylia uses Black Shoes before Saber finishes the burst.
Lylia uses Purify or defensive item timing to break the pickoff.
Saber lacks damage and Lylia survives long enough to reset.

reasons: Obsidia can threaten Lylia because Hunt of Bone prevents the tethered enemy from using displacement skills.
Lylia depends heavily on Black Shoes to survive burst and reset her position, HP state, and Shadow Energy charges.
If Hunt of Bone lands before Black Shoes is used, Lylia becomes much easier to finish during the tether window.

proof.summary: Lylia wants to survive burst by returning to her Black Shoes position, while Obsidia's Hunt of Bone can tether the target and prevent displacement skills, creating a punish window before Lylia can reset.
worksBestWhen: Obsidia lands Hunt of Bone before Lylia casts Black Shoes.
Lylia is already low or has stepped forward to poke.
Obsidia or her team has enough follow-up damage during the tether.
failureCases: Lylia uses Black Shoes before Hunt of Bone connects.
Lylia keeps distance and forces Obsidia to engage from a bad angle.
Current patch interaction does not block Black Shoes as a displacement skill.

reasons: Minsitthar can restrict Lylia's mobility tools if she is caught inside King's Calling.
This is useful because Lylia becomes much easier to punish when she cannot freely reposition or reset.

proof.summary: Lylia wants to reposition and reset with Black Shoes, while Minsitthar's King's Calling can disable movement skills for enemies inside the field.
worksBestWhen: Minsitthar casts King's Calling after Lylia steps forward to poke.
Lylia is trapped before she can safely use her reset.
Allies are ready to burst her inside the zone.
failureCases: Lylia stays outside King's Calling and continues zoning.
Minsitthar uses ultimate too early and Lylia waits it out.
Lylia has already reset to a safer position before the zone matters.
